add_library(dswp_runtime STATIC
  dswp_queue.cpp
)

target_include_directories(dswp_runtime PUBLIC
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
)

# We link with pthread in the benchmark consumers; the runtime itself
# only uses std::atomic and std::thread::yield, no thread-creation API.
find_package(Threads REQUIRED)
target_link_libraries(dswp_runtime PUBLIC Threads::Threads)

set_target_properties(dswp_runtime PROPERTIES
  POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON
)

# Externally-linked stage functions used by the DSWPTransform pass when
# rewriting sum_list. Eventually these will be IR-generated by the pass;
# until then they are hand-written here and linked at the end.
add_library(dswp_stages_sum_list STATIC
  dswp_stages_sum_list.c
)
target_link_libraries(dswp_stages_sum_list PUBLIC dswp_runtime)
set_target_properties(dswp_stages_sum_list PROPERTIES
  POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON
)
